action: Add an explicit S-0001 bridge or manifest note for the GTC page 29 render so the selected-100 source note can resolve the local PDF provenance without inference.

action: Reconcile the selected-100 rights status with manifest status for the GTC page 29 source card/slide substitute.
acceptance_check: Selected matrix, manifest, and any source-note row agree on whether the asset is ready SVG, local ignored render, or a private-use source surface.
blocked_until_done: Publication readiness may overstate rights/render status.

action: Keep source IDs, access dates, creator/org, page/path, rights note, and blocked-claim note together in final source notes.
acceptance_check: Each selected exhibit has a final source-note cluster preserving these six fields or an explicit reason why a field is not applicable.
blocked_until_done: Caption and provenance can drift apart during layout.

action: Every local ignored raster, screenshot slot, source-media file, or photo candidate must carry private-use/publication-rights status in source notes.
acceptance_check: Final source notes visibly distinguish ready original SVGs from private-use renders, ignored captures, and acquisition slots.
blocked_until_done: Private production evidence may be mistaken for publication-cleared imagery.

action: Generated SVGs can use Codex/local data provenance, but final source notes must still name the underlying source rows or claim-audit rows.
acceptance_check: Generated SVG source notes include local data table and source IDs or state that the figure is a purely original schematic.
blocked_until_done: Original art may become detached from factual support.

action: Benchmark, leaderboard, and pricing exhibits need source scope fields before final placement.
acceptance_check: Source notes include source date, task/category/split/model scope, pricing semantics, or explicit same-scope exclusion as relevant.
blocked_until_done: Sorted or priced visuals may imply live rank, price-quality, productivity, or broad superiority.

action: Public-domain/Commons/company physical imagery needs exact attribution, revision/license, and blocked-claim notes before publication.
acceptance_check: Photo/source-media notes include author/org, license or rights status, file/revision path, access date, and blocked capacity/workload/power/yield claims.
blocked_until_done: Physical texture may overclaim deployment, capacity, workload, power delivery, emissions, or yield.

action: Source-note completeness is not finished until rendered PDF QA proves note proximity and readability.
acceptance_check: Final PDF QA checks note presence, caption-note proximity, text extraction order, and legibility for selected exhibits.
blocked_until_done: A complete TSV can still fail as a book page.
